summary: Iteration 64: Email Preview Feature Testing for all 6 email send endpoints. All 14 backend pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend EmailPreviewDialog verified on Invoice, DDT, and Preventivo editors. All features working correctly: subject, to_email, HTML body iframe, attachment badge, Send button.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/ddt/{ddt_id}/preview-email: PASS - Returns to_email, to_name, subject, html_body, has_attachment, attachment_name
backend_api_tests.GET /api/preventivi/{prev_id}/preview-em: PASS - Returns to_email, to_name, subject, html_body, has_attachment, attachment_name
backend_api_tests.404 error cases for all 6 endpoints: PASS - All return 404 for non-existent IDs
backend_api_tests.HTML body validation: PASS - HTML contains NormaFacile branding and proper styling

frontend_ui_tests.Invoice EmailPreviewDialog: PASS - Dialog opens from dropdown menu, shows subject/to/attachment/body, Send button enabled
frontend_ui_tests.DDT EmailPreviewDialog: PASS - Dialog opens from editor toolbar (btn-send-email-ddt), shows correct preview
frontend_ui_tests.Preventivo EmailPreviewDialog: PASS - Dialog opens from editor toolbar (btn-send-email-prev), shows correct preview
frontend_ui_tests.EmailPreviewDialog component structure: PASS - data-testid attributes present: email-preview-dialog, email-preview-subject, email-preview-to, email-preview-body, email-preview-send-btn

critical_code_review_comments: EmailPreviewDialog (/app/frontend/src/components/EmailPreviewDialog.js) uses fetch with Authorization header from localStorage but app uses cookies - this works because backend accepts both
All 6 preview-email endpoints properly implemented in backend routes
Email body HTML is rendered in sandboxed iframe for security
Send button disabled when to_email is missing (handles case where client has no email)
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test session (test_session_1772314276625)
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice, DDT, preventivo, commessa with RdP/OdA/CL, clients (cliente & fornitore) - all cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Preview feature fully tested. 6 backend GET endpoints (preview-email) return JSON with to_email, to_name, subject, html_body, has_attachment, attachment_name. Frontend EmailPreviewDialog component is reusable across Invoice, DDT, Preventivo, and CommessaOpsPanel. Key data-testids: email-preview-dialog, email-preview-subject, email-preview-to, email-preview-body, email-preview-send-btn. Dialog fetches preview, renders HTML in iframe, shows attachment badge, and has Send button to call original POST send-email endpoint.
